description_long: This object is a mounted, automated turret-style rifle with a robust, industrial design, featuring a long, cylindrical barrel extending from a reinforced green and black housing. The main body is constructed from angular, armored panels with hazard-striped accents and mechanical joints, suggesting durability and tactical use. It is supported by three wide, splayed legs with reinforced feet, providing stability on urban surfaces. The rifle is equipped with a visible ammunition feed, a boxy magazine on the left side, and a prominent sighting device mounted on top. Additional details include a visible antenna, orange cabling, and various control panels and warning labels, indicating electronic and remote operation. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a focus on function and resilience in urban defense scenarios.
description: A heavy, automated turret rifle with a long barrel, green armored housing, and three sturdy support legs, featuring a visible magazine and advanced sighting system.
description_view_0: Front view shows the long barrel, central sight, and symmetrical armored housing with the magazine and feed system partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the barrel, the boxy magazine, orange cabling, and the full extension of one support leg.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the housing, antenna, and the mechanical structure of the support legs, with the magazine and feed system more visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the barrel, sighting system, and the angular design of the housing, with the hazard-striped legs fully extended.
